review_text: I was nervous but Marla was amazing! I'm still healing but loving my results so far!
I had The Perfect Derma Peel done by Danielle and she was fantastic! She is so personable and really made me feel comfortable in her chair. Can't wait to schedule another peel with her!

Wow, I experienced an amazing service by Nadina at ARVIV! YAG facial.  Nadina is an expert with laser technology.  My skin looks amazing.  As an aging woman, always nice to find treatments with amazing results.  Thank you Nadina, I'll be back soon!

DO NOT GO HERE. Save yourself the heartache. I got a terrible filler job done and they refused to refund me to get it done elsewhere. They took no accountability and they gave no apology. It is strictly about taking your money regardless of what they do to your face.

They wouldn't honor a $100 gift certificate that had no expiration date on it. If you want it used by a certain date, and there's a space to write the expiration date on it, then make that known. If you choose to not write an expiration date on it, then you are saying “it does not expire” and therefore should honor it. Also…very rude customer service! Would not recommend!!!

I am not understanding why they are asking for a tip after injections. I found this to be very unprofessional as it was, I assume, a licensed nurse doing the procedure. It is inappropriate to ask for a tip for this type of service/ about a week after my injection my eye is dropping due to injector error- I am very disappointed with the results I paid a lot of money and was told I will just have to let it wear off- in 3 to 4 months. I am not impressed , I used to get very good results with Emily but she is no longer with Clarity- Michelle needs better training

I originally had a pink tattoo and after three sessions, it was about 95% gone. I came back in to get the last few areas, and the whole tattoo turned a green/blue. After another session, it got darker. I came back for another session and they assured me it would be gone after that. It has gotten darker with every session, and I just talked to another tattoo removal shop that told me it will be impossible to get out, because the white ink from the pink has oxidized and more sessions will continue to make it darker. They told me that whoever originally removed the tattoo should have known that and warned me about it. I'm incredibly disappointed that Clean Slate Ink did not responsibly remove my tattoo and inform me of what was going on, and continued to take my money while making the issue worse. I now have a green/blue faded tattoo on my wrist that looks worse than my original tattoo and can only be covered by an even larger tattoo. I'm honestly devastated. I would recommend going somewhere else that has more knowledge and experience and will be more up front with you.

AVOID -- Left the area and asked the owner for a refund of the remaining balance: $727.20. He agreed and said he would. I followed up a dozen times through calls, text, and email with no response. Dishonest business.

Had a really negative experience with tattoo removal here, and wanted to share my experience with people researching who have color tattoos. I had been promised positive results, only later to find out that my skin had been severely burned and scarred from this treatment. I strongly recommend finding another place for this type of treatment.
I'm very pleased with the service I received
Always great. Very professional

Dr. Glaich is very personable and easy to talk to.  She's also very thorough in her examinations with the highest degree of professionalism and care.  I would highly recommend Dr. Glaich to anyone seeking professional skin care.

I love enfuse medspa! The only spa I go for all my beauty needs. Chris is my injectable nurse she's done Morpheus 8, lip flip, Botox and laser hair removal on me and I always have a great experience! Chris is honest, trustworthy, and reliable. She makes sure I am happy with the results and will only do the necessary to make everything look to perfection and very natural. She and the team always go far and beyond, highly recommend!

I had such a great experience here that I felt like I had to share.

From the moment I walked in, Kevin at the front desk made me feel so welcomed and comfortable. He was kind, patient, and just had such a positive, calming energy.

Patti did my eyebrow tattoo laser removal, and I can't say enough good things about her. I can finally say goodbye to my dark angry bird eyebrows! She took her time to really listen to what I wanted to achieve with my face treatments and walked me through everything in a way that felt honest and thoughtful.
Chris was a G, she gave me good advice and did everything possible to make me comfortable - this meant a lot because I am crybaby and have no tolerance for pain 😂

I have nothing but good things to say about Erasable. Ease of scheduling, check in, consultations, procedures, check out; all professional and efficient. ARNP Kristen is patient and personable, and takes the time to discuss needs and expectations.
Amazing place and super professional staff. Love it

At first, I was so scared about getting my old microbladed eyebrow tattoos removed… but the minute I walked in, I was impressed. The office was beautiful, spacious, and clean. I first had a consultation with Lacey, and then the procedure. It exceeded my expectations. The staff were very friendly and professional, and Lacey made me feel very comfortable. She and the staff are wonderful! - Paula

Spent 150 for literally a 2 min session for a small tattoo behind  my ear
A SCAM and waste of my money and time. Do your research and look elsewhere folks!

If I could leave negative I would ….. they're sweet nice when getting money but unfortunately their finance company pays them in full so after weather services are completed or in my case never healed third degree burn scars in two places…..

The front desk staff is super sweet and I automatically feel comfortable. I highly recommend! Irene is a sweetheart and makes sure you feel comfortable during the whole process! She needs a raise :)))

I went here to get my micro bladed eyebrows laser removed. I was so nervous, it took me years to even get up the courage to do this. April was great to explain the whole process for me and to answer any questions I had. The results were incredible, truly life changing. I will not hesitate to go back to them again. Overall, great experience!

I have had the best experience with April at Ink Lifters!! I just finished my second treatment and I am so thrilled with my results so far! I have seen a huge difference. April makes you feel comfortable and she is very knowledgeable! Can't wait to see the end result!

I've been coming here for almost 12months for 2 removals and every time was seen by Mckayla. She made every session a good experience always assuring I was comfortable thru the entire process. Definitely recommend for any tattoo removal.

I do not recommend this company for tattoo removal. My first experience was on March 22nd and the technician, Maggie, was absolutely amazing. However, I've since tried to rebook Maggie and have sadly been informed that she is no longer employed there. The woman that worked on me was not very nice, quick with the process and seemed like she could care less about the integrity of my skin and if I were to scar.

Firstly let me say that Maggie who used to work at Tatt2away was amazing! She took great care of me and was very careful with my skin concerns! However the lady they sent in from corporate was horrible. With her the treatment was painful and left a horrible scar!! They care about profits over the effectiveness of the treatment, they lie about scaring risks.

I wanted to love this process, but unfortunately ended up with permanent scarring and a tattoo that looks far worse than it did prior to coming here. I paid $1800 for 4 treatments. I used 2 and neither worked, only made matters worse. They only will refund $600 of the unused $900.

This company's technology looks amazing, HOWEVER, my personal experience with the clinic has convinced me that this is a very disorganized company. My appointment was abruptly cancelled after disclosing a mild hypermobility syndrome. Nothing on the website mentions that folks with a hypermobility disorder will be summarily rejected from treatment.

PROS: Great results! Mandy makes sure I'm comfortable every session! It's faster and more efficient than laser removal. Would recommend to everyone!

CONS: can be very painful/uncomfortable, so make sure you numb the skin before the session

I can't express enough how thrilled I am with my experience at Tat2Away, specifically with Mandy. Her meticulous approach instilled confidence in me from the get-go. Thanks to Mandy's skillful technique and dedication, my tattoo has faded significantly with each session, exceeding my expectations.

Absolute worst place. My first appointment, Jazz forgot to give me her number. Setting up appointments was horrible. Eventually she got some help, but by then I had decided I was done with her forgetfulness and unprofessionalism. Get laser or a tattoo cover up honestly. By far the worst experience.
Not for melanin rich or scar prone skin. Left huge raised scars covering my arm.

AVOID TATT2AWAY. My first and only session was Spring 2022. After proper aftercare and nearly four years later, the ink is mostly gone in the treated spots but I am also left with some hypertrophic scars from the procedure.
Ms. Idalia and Michelle were kind and very professional, it felt like we had been going there for years and the service was amazing!

I had a great experience through and through with Idalia! She was very informative and helpful with explaining the process. We did complete a test spot and I had a great result! I have been working with Cheri since Idalia left and she is absolutely AMAZING!!

Idalia was very sweet and did a great job working on my tattoo removal. We are one session in and I'm excited to see how the process progresses. This is a great location and I'm excited that this removal option has moved to the Houston area.
Very poor customer service! Hung up on me as I was inquiring about their services
The staff and crew there are the most hospitable and nicest people ever they make you feel happy and help you stay calm and are excellent at answering your questions. Recommend them 100% for anybody.
Dr. Ramos is the best, I am removing my first and last tattoo. I have a good experience with Dr. Ramos and his staff. The environment is good and all the staff are very helpful.

Doctor told me lasering my mole would lighten and flatten it. After 1,500 dollars the results have not changed the mole is still the same and raised and not flat. They do not follow up on emails and ignore you.

Horrible! They made me wait one hour from the time of my appointment. Before I fixed my appointment and paid, my specific query was Do you have any non-surgical procedure for eye bag removal/ reduction? And the Doctor told me they only did surgery. Such an unprofessional experience.
The sculptra didn't work at all. My before and after pictures are the same after spending thousands of dollars.

Very satisfied with my tattoo removal experience! Mike has been wonderfully patient with me from the start. Always quick (but thorough), professional, and personable. This office has made my tattoo removal experience as painless as possible!

I have been receiving permanent make up removal treatments here for over a year. Mike is great we had a thorough conversation about what to expect and the risks involved in the laser treatments before we began. This was specially important because we would be working on a very delicate area- my face. I highly recommend Medermis tattoo removal.

I had a tattoo done in March of this year that did not turn out as expected. I had a consultation with Mike 4 weeks later and these are my results (before and after) early November after 3 sessions. The pain level and cost were both lower than I thought they'd be and sessions took less than 10 minutes each.

El día de ayer 04/17/2026 tuve una cita para la remoción de mi tatuaje en cejas y aunque el personal fue súper amable, estoy un tanto decepcionada, ya que no es nada barato pagué $400 y cuando salí me di cuenta de que no le pasaron parejo el láser a las cejas.

The facility is clean the staff is great and the appointments are very quick. If you're going to get black ink removed I'd highly recommend but as for color ink I would recommend not wasting your time or money. I've removed 5 black ink tattoos with Removery and attempting to remove a purple ink tattoo but it's not been successful. I had 7 sessions and all it did was change the color from purple to pink.
Incredible and fast service! They did a great job on the eyebrows I am thrilled with my results! I highly recommend Removery to all!

I had such a wonderful experience with Gina! She was kind, caring, and really took the time to help me feel more confident about my skin journey. The entire office was welcoming. So excited for what my future skin!

This is one of my FAVORITE med spas. The staff, the quality of the services and their care for their customers is what keeps me coming back. I live in another state and I fly in once or twice a year to get maintenance done and I will continue to do it!
I absolutely love Stephanie! Ive had several sessions of laser hair removal and Stephanie's attention to detail is second to none. Please do not walk to Skintellect; RUN!! Ask for Stephanie!

Firstly let me say that Maggie who used to work at Tatt2away was amazing! However the lady they sent in from corporate was horrible. With her the treatment was painful and left a horrible scar!! They care about profits over the effectiveness of the treatment, they lie about scaring risks.

Michelle is wonderful. I've done tatt2away with other techs, I've done laser, etc. and this was my favorite removal experience. super fast, amazing attention to detail, and genuinely seems to really care about giving the best results. thank you!!

My Tatt2Away experience was amazing, thanks to Michelle. She truly knows what she's doing and made the entire process so much better. The studio was impeccably clean, and from the moment I walked in, I knew I was in for a great experience. Michelle is incredibly knowledgeable and informative, which made me feel very safe and comfortable.

My appointment was abruptly cancelled after disclosing a mild hypermobility syndrome. Nothing on the website mentions that folks with a hypermobility disorder will be summarily rejected from treatment. Very disorganized company with poor communication.

Mandy was incredibly knowledgeable about both laser tattoo removal and the Tatt2Away method. She took the time to explain the differences between the two processes, which really helped me make an informed decision.

I had a fantastic experience with Mandy at Tatt2Away. From the first consultation to my next session, she was knowledgeable, caring, and professional. She took the time to explain each step of the process, making sure I felt comfortable and informed. Amazing results!!!

I used this service to remove my eyebrow Microblading. I would not recommend it. The healing was so long, and I had vertical striped scabs. It also didn't fully remove the ink. I also have slight scarring (pink, depressed skin). I started laser treatment today, and this seems like a much better and safer approach.
I regret going to Tatt2away more than getting the original tattoo. They mutilate you, end of story.

Tatt2away completely mutilated by 18 year olds arm. She went back to the clinic and they said she was having a reaction. After several visits with the dermatologist the doctor confirmed that it was a completely botched tattoo removal that has left her with extreme keloid scars on her whole arm.
they literally never answer the phone. It's actually so annoying.
Super quick and friendly environment!

Absolutely amazing team: straight forward intake and exciting first treatment. Zac did amazing at making sure I understood both the procedure and science behind it. Sarah checked in regularly and made sure I was okay. She was also great at explaining the aftercare.
